an9.2:1.0.1: Then a certain bhikkhu approached the Blessed One, paid homage to him, sat down to one side, and said to him: "It is said, Bhante: ‘Equipped with supports, equipped with supports.’ In what way is a bhikkhu equipped with supports?"
an9.2:1.0.2: "Basing himself on these five things, that bhikkhu should rely on four things.What four? Here, (6) having reflected, a bhikkhu uses some things; (7) having reflected, he patiently endures some things; (8) having reflected, he avoids some things; and (9) having reflected, he dispels some things.
